reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar y atención. Impecable en todas sus áreas. El piso donde están los surtidores, es un espejo. El comedor es muy lindo y con una ambientación moderna.
Es un lugar estratégico para los turistas.
Pero hay cosas para cambiar;
° las toallas y toallones, muy desgastados,
° el personal de servicio de limpieza, no conversar en la galería en voz alta, en horas muy temprana,
° ser más previsores con los insumos de la cocina; no habían huevos.
Salvo estos detalles, es un lugar para recomendar.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place and great service. Impeccable in every area. The floor where the pumps are located is like a mirror. The dining area is very nice and has a modern ambiance.

It's a strategic location for tourists.

But there are a few things that could be improved:

° the towels and bath towels are very worn,
° the cleaning staff shouldn't talk loudly on the patio, especially in the early hours,
° they should be more proactive with kitchen supplies; there were no eggs. Aside from these minor issues, it's a place I would recommend.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBaEt5S1hBEAE
